persona_prose:
An ENFP personality type.
Disposition: outgoing and energised by people; abstract, pattern- and possibility-oriented; decides by values and impact on people; open-ended, likes options open.
Cognitive style: Lead with Extraverted Intuition (Ne): diverges into many possibilities and connections. Support with Introverted Feeling (Fi): guided by a deep inner value compass and authenticity. Less developed: Extraverted Thinking (tertiary) and Introverted Sensing (inferior), which shows under stress.
Tends to care about: possibility and potential, new ideas, connections.

provenance.method: 5-axis 16Personalities/NERIS structure + Harold Grant function stack; saliences derived from function meanings
provenance.copyright_note: No third-party type descriptions ingested; saliences derived from function theory. Type framework is a public structure, not a copyrighted text.

sources.label: 16Personalities / NERIS model (5-axis structure incl. Assertive–Turbulent)
sources.note: public model structure followed; no profile text copied

sources.label: Harold Grant cognitive-function stack (Jungian lineage)
sources.note: determines dom/aux/tert/inf; not official MBTI, theoretically contested

sources.label: C. G. Jung, Psychological Types (1921)

sources.label: Saliences derived from standard cognitive-function meanings
